name: Linzer Augen (Linzer Eyes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Beat the butter until light and soft, then beat in the sugar. Continue beating until very light.
3. Stir in the almonds, then the flour. Scrape dough onto a piece of plastic wrap, flatten, and wrap.
4. Chill until firm, about 1 hour.
5. Flour dough and surface lightly, roll dough to 1/4-inch thickness.
6. Cut into 3-to-4-inch rounds with a fluted cutter.
7. Transfer to paper-lined pans and cut a 1-inch opening in half the rounds with a plain cutter.
8. Paint the almond-coated bases with beaten egg.
9. Combine jam and water, bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally. Strain into another pan and simmer until sticky.
10. Sift confectioners' sugar over the almond-coated bases.
11. Paint the other halves with glaze and adhere sugared bases to them.
12. Fill openings with more glaze.
